title: CENTCOM Briefs Trump on Iran Strike Options
summary: US Central Command prepares to brief President Trump on plans for short, intense strikes against Iran to force nuclear negotiations.
contents:
## CENTCOM Briefs Trump on Iran Strike Options

### Overview
US Central Command prepares to brief President Trump on plans for short, intense strikes against Iran to force nuclear negotiations.

### Details
CENTCOM Commander Admiral Brad Cooper briefs Trump on military options including strikes on Iranian infrastructure and increased naval pressure in the Strait of Hormuz. Iran warns of "prolonged, painful blows" in retaliation, referencing prior attacks on US bases. Trump rejects Iran's proposal to reopen the Strait in exchange for ending the US blockade.[1][4][5]

### Geographic context
Location: Washington, D.C., United States.
